name: Puffco New Peak Joystick Cap
summary: The Puffco New Peak Joystick Cap features 360º directed airflow for accurate heating and larger clouds with improved flavour.
description: The Puffco New Peak Joystick Cap features 360º directed airflow for accurate heating and larger clouds with improved flavour. Its stainless steel and silicone design is both durable and easy to clean, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience with every use. *Proxy chamber unit not included A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
